metadata.description: AI agent skills for the Prompsit Translation API CLI. Ships two plugins: a CLI skill bundle (setup, translate, evaluate, score, annotate) and an editorial localization workflow.

plugins.name: prompsit
plugins.description: Prompsit Translation API: CLI setup, text/document translation, quality evaluation (BLEU, chrF, MetricX), parallel corpus scoring (Bicleaner), and monolingual data annotation (Monotextor).

plugins.name: prompsit-localize
plugins.description: Editorial localization pipeline (agent workflow). Tier-based strategy (witness/body/UI), glossary lock, back-translation gate, diff-aware re-runs. Wraps `prompsit translate` plus an LLM editor pass.
